HoverColors.UI.Title: Hover Colors
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Info: See Options menu to turn off tooltips.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.InfoDisabled:
Yellow = tooltips off.
Click (i) to enable.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.CollapsePanel:
Collapse panel to outline row only.
Click again expands to full panel.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Close:
Close panel. Default hotkey: J.
Game top-left icon On/Off.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetOutline: OUTLINE - click to reset color + alpha (opacity) to game defaults.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.FillOpacity: FILL: opacity of area inside the border.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetGuidelines: GUIDELINES - tap to toggle S1/S2/S3 + opacity between vanilla set and your last custom selections.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesDashedC:
Dashed road/alignment guide line color + opacity.
 The Alpha 4th bar syncs with the opacity slider.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesOpacity:
Dashed guide line opacity (alpha).
Synced with the dashed swatch alpha bar and the Options menu slider.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.GuidelinesColor: Large guide circles / spacing lines color + opacity.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.SpecializedIndust: Hide Extractor Lot area preview fill.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset1:
Slot 1 — tap to apply. hold 0.8s saves your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 or slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.Preset2:
Slot 2 — tap to apply. hold 0.8s saves your current color.
Hotkey K toggles between slot 1 or slot 2.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetPresets:
↻ Switch between preset Set A and Set B.
Each set has P1 + P2. Hold P1/P2 to save over the active set.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.RestorePresetDefa:
↺ Restore all 4 preset slots to mod defaults.
This overwrites saved preset colors.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.DistrictColors:
Click for District overlay fill and boundary line color/opacity.
Hold 0.8s to reset Districts to vanilla.
HoverColors.UI.Tooltip.ResetDistrictColo: Reset all districts to the game's vanilla blue.
